jobs.title: NBE NEET PG Exam Form 2026, Notification Out Apply Online
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://natboard.edu.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

vacancy_details.post_name: NBE National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test (NEET) PG 2026
vacancy_details.eligibility: MBBS Degree from a Recognized University, 01 Year Internship Complete Before 30/09/2026

faqs.question: What is the application fee, and how can it be paid?
faqs.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 3500/-. For SC/ST/Female candidates, it is ₹2500/-. The fee can be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for this?
faqs.answer: The last date to fill out the online form is 21-07-2026.

faqs.question: How do I apply for this recruitment?
faqs.answer: You will need to apply online.

NBE NEET PG Exam Form 2026 Important Dat: Selective Edit Window: 31 July to 10 August 2026
NBE NEET PG Exam Form 2026 How to Apply: Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage.
First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password.
After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

rows.text: Department of Elementary Education, Haryana LKG to Class 1st (2nd Round) Admission 2026-27 Short Details of Admission Notification

Born Between (For Nursery) : 01/04/2022 To 31/03/2023 Born Between (For LKG) : 01/04/2021 To 31/03/2022 Born Between (For UKG) : 01/04/2020 To 31/03/2021 Born Between (For Grade-I) : 01/04/2019 To 31/03/2020 The Age Limit as on : 01/04/2026
Aadhar Card Birth Certificate Residence Certificate Parivar Pahchan Patra Income Certificate Passport Size Photo

Applicant must be a Permanent Resident of Haryana. Must belong to EWS / Disadvantaged Groups (Scheduled Castes, Child of War Widow, CWSN, HIV Affected Child, Orphan) For EWS category, annual family income should not exceed ₹1,80,000

Free and compulsory education for children aged 6-14 years 25% seat reservation in private schools for EWS and Disadvantaged Groups (Scheduled Castes, Child of War Widow, CWSN, HIV Affected Child, Orphan) children Quality education standards and infrastructure requirements No discrimination based on social, economic, or cultural background

25% Mandatory Reservation : Private schools must reserve 25% seats for RTE students Classes Covered : Nursery, LKG, UKG, and Class 1st. Neighborhood Criteria : 0-1 KM Participating Schools : 413 Schools Total RTE Seats : 3193 Seats
